case_title: CHRISTINE NG VS. CAROLINE STORK et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NG, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT STORK, CAROLINE PALACIOS, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY MARTIN VOONG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, CHRISTINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STORK, CAROLINE PALACIOS, CARLOS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
